# mainView

**Instance Property**

The main view of the preference pane.

## Declaration

```swift
var mainView: NSView { get set }
```

## Discussion

Subclasses should not need to override this unless they override [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()] or [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/assignMainView()].

## Getting the Bundle Information

- **bundle**: The preference pane’s bundle.
- **mainNibName**: The name of the preference pane’s nib file.

items.description: The name of the preference pane’s nib file.
